movie.actors: Todd Caldecott, Tiffany Paulsen, Tim Mirkovich, Kane Hodder
movie.plot: The graduating class of the local high school is going on a luxury cruise with Jason Voorhees as a stowaway. The heroine Rennie Wickham believes she was almost drowned by Jason as a child. Jason eventually sinks the boat and kills many of the students on it, but many of them escape to Manhattan. A long battle with Jason ensues until Jason is washed away in the New York sewers by a midnight flooding of toxic waste.
movie.title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
